---
title: "Exemple de document contenant du `{webr}` avec `quarto live`"
author: "Marie VAUGOYEAU"  
lang: fr
format: live-html
---

{{< include ./_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}


```{webr}
library(ggplot2)

penguins |> 
  ggplot() +
  aes(
    x = bill_dep,
    y = bill_len
  ) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "Forme du bec des pingouins",
    x = "largeur du bec (mm)",
    y = "longueur du bec (mm)"
  )
```
